title: Family Members
description: Mother, father, siblings, cousins — talk about the people closest to you.
summary_pt_br: Membros da família em inglês e os possessivos (my, your, his, her).

exercises.explanation: 'Mother' and 'father' are neutral. 'Mom' / 'dad' (or 'mum' in UK English) are affectionate, like 'mãe' / 'pai' in Brazilian Portuguese.
exercises.hint_pt_br: 'Mom' e 'dad' têm o mesmo tom de 'mãe' e 'pai' — informais e carinhosos.

exercises.question: My father's brother is my…
exercises.explanation: Father's brother OR mother's brother = UNCLE. His wife = aunt.

exercises.question: Your grandmother's daughter (who isn't your mother) is your…
exercises.explanation: Your grandmother has daughters — one is your mother, the others are your AUNTS.
exercises.hint_pt_br: Filha da sua avó que não é sua mãe = sua tia (aunt).

exercises.explanation: Possessive adjectives match the owner, not what's owned. 'Maria is his sister' (Maria is the sister of HIM — a male).
exercises.hint_pt_br: 'His' = dele (dono masculino). 'Her' = dela (dona feminina). O sexo é do DONO, não do objeto.

exercises.question: Complete: 'Paul is tall. ___ sister is short.'
exercises.explanation: Paul is male → we use HIS. 'His sister' = the sister of Paul (a male).
exercises.hint_pt_br: Paul é homem → 'His sister' (a irmã dele).

exercises.question: Complete: 'Anna is a teacher. ___ students love her.'
exercises.hint_pt_br: Anna é mulher → 'Her students' (os alunos DELA).

exercises.question: What's the plural of 'child'?
exercises.explanation: CHILD → CHILDREN is an irregular plural. 'Two children', never 'two childs'.

exercises.question: 'My parents' means…
exercises.explanation: PARENTS = mother + father only. 'Relatives' (parentes) is the broader word.
exercises.hint_pt_br: Atenção! 'Parents' em inglês = APENAS pai e mãe. 'Parentes' (família ampla) = 'relatives'.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I have one brother and one sister.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: No, my mother is a teacher.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes, my grandmother lives with us.

scenes.title: Listening story — Family Members
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça a situação com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que você entendeu — resumo, detalhes, seus pensamentos. O professor vai ler e comentar.
scenes.prompt_en: Write in English what you heard. A short summary is fine. Mention who spoke, what they said, and what you think about the situation.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que você ouviu. Pode ser um resumo curto. Diga quem falou, o que disseram e o que você achou.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: In this story, we meet Bia and a student. Mother, father, siblings, cousins — talk about the people closest to you. Listen carefully and think about what each person says.

paragraphs.speaker: The student
paragraphs.en: I have one brother and one sister.

paragraphs.speaker: The student
paragraphs.en: No, my mother is a teacher.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: That is the end of our short scene with Bia. Think about what you heard and how the conversation felt.
